leagueBriefing: Friday night in the NBA delivered star power and swings: Devin Booker took over late for Phoenix, Jayson Tatum returned in Boston, Miami ended Charlotte's heater, Houston flipped the game with a fourth-quarter avalanche, New York stunned Denver while Jamal Murray went down, San Antonio erased 25 against the Clippers, and Luka Doncic detonated for 44 in three quarters for the Lakers.

games.headline: Booker erupts in the third and Phoenix survives New Orleans' late push
games.brief: Phoenix looked in control after Devin Booker detonated in the third, then had to survive a frantic finish when New Orleans kept trimming the margin. The Suns executed just enough in the final 10 seconds at the line and escaped with a needed two-point win after nearly coughing up a double-digit second-half lead.
bullets: Devin Booker scored 32 points, including 18 in the third quarter.
Jalen Green added 25 as Phoenix built a 14-point second-half lead.
Grayson Allen hit two key free throws with 9.8 seconds left and finished with 12 points and 8 assists.
The game featured 63 total free-throw attempts: 37 for New Orleans and 26 for Phoenix.
Trey Murphy III led the Pelicans with 22, while Zion Williamson posted 19 points and 10 rebounds.
games.context: Phoenix steadied itself after a home loss the night before, while New Orleans missed a chance to steal one in crunch time on a back-to-back.

highlights.title: PELICANS at SUNS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 6, 2026

games.headline: Tatum returns and Boston cruises as Dallas' skid reaches six
games.brief: The biggest story in Boston was simply seeing Jayson Tatum back on the floor, and the Celtics made sure his return came in a comfortable win. Tatum shook off rust in limited bursts while Jaylen Brown and Derrick White carried the scoring load, and Dallas never found enough offense to make this competitive late.
bullets: Jayson Tatum played his first game in almost 10 months after an Achilles rupture, posting 15 points, 12 rebounds and 7 assists in 27 minutes.
Jaylen Brown finished with 24 points, 7 rebounds and 7 assists.
Derrick White added 20 points as Boston won for the fourth time in five games.
Dallas lost its sixth straight despite 19 points from Klay Thompson.
No. 1 pick Cooper Flagg had 16 points, 8 rebounds and 6 assists in his first game at TD Garden.
games.context: Boston's priority now is ramping Tatum safely for the postseason, and Friday was a clean first step.

highlights.title: MAVERICKS at CELTICS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 6, 2026

games.headline: Herro's near triple-double and late 3 end Charlotte's six-game run
games.brief: Charlotte had been flattening teams, but Miami punched back with shot-making and timing all night. Tyler Herro controlled the game as both scorer and creator, then buried a tie-breaking triple that sparked the decisive run and snapped the Hornets' six-game winning streak.
bullets: Tyler Herro had 33 points, 9 rebounds and 9 assists, going 8-for-10 from 3.
Herro's 3-pointer with 7:06 left broke a 108-108 tie during a game-turning 9-0 Heat run.
Bam Adebayo added 24 points and 12 rebounds, while Jaime Jaquez Jr. scored 21 off the bench.
Miami shot 18-for-38 (47%) from beyond the arc.
Kon Knueppel led Charlotte with 27 points, and Brandon Miller added 22 points and 13 rebounds.
games.context: Miami's fourth straight win came against a red-hot opponent and reinforced the Heat's upward momentum entering the stretch run.

highlights.title: HEAT at HORNETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 6, 2026

games.headline: Houston flips a fourth-quarter deficit with a 23-4 blitz to beat Portland
games.brief: Houston looked dead in the water early in the fourth, then completely suffocated Portland on both ends. The Rockets ripped off a massive run, shot blisteringly well in the period and turned what felt like a Blazers win into a statement comeback behind Alperen Sengun and Amen Thompson.
bullets: Houston trailed 85-77 early in the fourth before a 23-4 run swung the game.
The Rockets outscored Portland 29-17 in the final quarter and shot 67% in the period.
Alperen Sengun scored 28 on 11-of-15 shooting despite foul trouble and only 26 minutes.
Amen Thompson added 26, making 11 of 12 shots and scoring 8 in the fourth.
Kevin Durant scored 20 for Houston, which improved to 39-23.
games.context: With Western seeding packed tight, this kind of comeback win could loom large for Houston's playoff positioning.

highlights.title: TRAIL BLAZERS at ROCKETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 6, 2026

games.headline: Knicks rout Denver by 39 as Murray exits with sprained ankle
games.brief: New York didn't just beat Denver, it steamrolled the Nuggets in their own building and emptied the benches early. OG Anunoby set the tone from the start, and the game turned from a blowout into a crisis moment for Denver when Jamal Murray left before halftime with a sprained ankle.
bullets: OG Anunoby scored 34 to lead New York's 142-point outburst.
The 39-point defeat tied the largest home loss in Nuggets history.
Jamal Murray suffered a sprained ankle late in the first half and did not return.
Nikola Jokic scored 38, but Denver trailed 105-80 after three quarters.
Karl-Anthony Towns had 19 points and 17 rebounds, and Knicks starters sat the fourth.
games.context: Denver's result hurt in two ways: a historic blowout and uncertainty around Murray right as the playoff race tightens.

highlights.title: KNICKS at NUGGETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 6, 2026

games.headline: Wembanyama leads 25-point comeback as Spurs stun Clippers late
games.brief: San Antonio looked buried in the third before turning the game into a sprint and then a fistfight in the final minute. Victor Wembanyama was the anchor and finisher, and the Spurs completed one of their biggest comebacks of the season to keep their blistering run alive.
bullets: Victor Wembanyama posted 27 points, 10 rebounds and 4 blocks.
San Antonio rallied from a 25-point deficit and opened the fourth on an 18-5 run.
Wembanyama's go-ahead dunk with 16 seconds left made it 113-112.
Kawhi Leonard scored 30 for the Clippers, whose three-game winning streak ended.
San Antonio improved to 46-17 and has won 14 of its last 15 games.
games.context: The comeback reinforced San Antonio's status as a real West threat, not just a hot streak team.

highlights.title: CLIPPERS at SPURS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 6, 2026

games.headline: Doncic drops 44 in three quarters and Lakers cruise without LeBron
games.brief: With LeBron James resting, Luka Doncic put the game away before the fourth quarter even started. He detonated early, controlled tempo all night and gave the Lakers an easy win over a Pacers team that keeps sliding further into post-break trouble.
bullets: Luka Doncic scored 44 points in three quarters, hitting 7 threes on 14-of-25 shooting.
Doncic had 22 in the first quarter and reached 20-plus in the opening period for the fifth time this season.
The Lakers won for the fourth time in five games despite resting LeBron James.
Doncic became the fourth Laker ever with at least 10 40-point games in a season, joining Kobe Bryant, Elgin Baylor and Jerry West.
Indiana has lost eight straight since the All-Star break.
games.context: The Lakers showed they can produce elite offense even with LeBron out, while Indiana's skid is becoming a major concern.

highlights.title: PACERS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 6, 2026
